messages.content: Create the file P:\aura-book\frontend\src\views\Agent.jsx — this is the biggest page in the app (was 1085 lines in Vue). Convert it to React JSX with 6 tabs: Image Gen, Chat, PDF, Reminders, Prayer Times, Study Materials.
Created Agent.jsx with 897 lines covering all 6 tabs with full functionality including API integration, state management, and responsive CSS.
